title: eYone Baby Blanket 75×100 cm - Soft Embossed Fleece - Star Pattern - Lightweight Baby Blanket - Pram, Cot & Stroller - Unisex Gift - Dark Grey
features: SOFT EMBOSSED FLEECE: Double-layer fleece embossed with stars - soft, cosy and gentle on delicate skin.
VERSATILE 75×100 CM: Perfectly sized for prams, cots, stroller walks or nap time at home and daycare.
STAR DESIGN: Elegant star pattern adds style to the nursery and creates a timeless, unisex look.
EASY CARE & DURABLE: Machine washable at 30°C, quick-drying and designed to stay fluffy and soft.
READY TO GIFT: Neutral grey with ribbon wrap - an ideal unisex gift for baby showers or birthdays.
description: This soft baby blanket provides with soft, gentle comfort for your infant, appropriate for newborns to toddlers, even for cat or dog for sleeping. It will surely be a welcome gift for any new mom-to-be. This blanket keeps your little one warm wherever you go. Easy to use and clean, super soft and comfortable, they are still as cozy after washing as before. Great for travel, playtime, bed time and receiving. Soft and lightweight material is good for all seasons and conditions. Available in a selection of versatile colours – pink, blue, milk white Washing Information Wash before use Do not bleach Machine washable at 30 degrees
